_note: Greenfield project — content_sha256 fields are empty until SS-01 bootstrap creates the files. forge-run should populate sha256 after each sub-spec completes against the actual file contents.

contracts.name: FeedSource
contracts.signature: type FeedSource = { id: string; url: string; displayName: string; sourceType: 'rss'|'atom'|'youtube'|'website'|'mock'; category?: string; tags: string[]; refreshIntervalMin: number; health: Health; notifyOnNew: boolean; pruneAfterDays?: number }

contracts.name: FeedItem
contracts.signature: type FeedItem = { id: string; feedId: string; sourceType: string; title: string; url: string; author?: string; published: number; summary?: string; thumbnailUrl?: string; mediaType: 'article'|'video'|'bookmark'; durationSec?: number }

contracts.name: UserState
contracts.signature: type UserState = { readIds: Set<string>; savedIds: Set<string>; starredIds: Set<string>; ignoredIds: Set<string>; scrollPositions: Record<string, number> }

contracts.name: ISourceAdapter
contracts.signature: interface ISourceAdapter { name: string; detect(url: string): boolean; resolve(url: string): Promise<FeedSource | FeedSource[]>; fetch(source: FeedSource): Promise<unknown>; parse(raw: unknown): FeedItem[] }

contracts.name: Logger
contracts.signature: interface Logger { error(msg: string, ...args: unknown[]): void; warn(msg: string, ...args: unknown[]): void; info(msg: string, ...args: unknown[]): void; debug(msg: string, ...args: unknown[]): void }

contracts.name: StateService
contracts.signature: interface StateService { load(): Promise<PersistedState>; save(patch: Partial<PersistedState>): void; flush(): void }

contracts.name: CacheService
contracts.signature: interface CacheService { open(): Promise<void>; close(): void; putItems(items: FeedItem[]): Promise<void>; getItem(itemId: string): Promise<FeedItem | undefined>; getItemsByFeed(feedId: string): Promise<FeedItem[]>; pruneOldItems(saved: Set<string>, starred: Set<string>, days: number): Promise<number>; putExtractedArticle(itemId: string, html: string): Promise<void>; getExtractedArticle(itemId: string): Promise<string | undefined> }

contracts.name: useStrataStore
contracts.signature: function useStrataStore<T>(selector: (state: StoreState & StoreActions) => T): T

contracts.name: FeedFetchScheduler
contracts.signature: interface FeedFetchScheduler { start(): void; stop(): void; refreshNow(feedId: string): Promise<void>; on(event: 'RefreshComplete'|'RefreshFailed'|'BatchedRefreshComplete', handler: (e: RefreshEvent) => void): void }

contracts.name: ArticlePreviewService.extract
contracts.signature: function extract(item: FeedItem, signal?: AbortSignal): Promise<PreviewResult>; type PreviewResult = { source: 'readability'|'content-encoded'|'summary'|'none'; html: string; title?: string }

contracts.name: NoteService.save
contracts.signature: function save(item: FeedItem, extractedHtml?: string): Promise<{ path: string }>

contracts.name: OPMLService.importFromString
contracts.signature: function importFromString(xml: string, options?: { defaultCategory?: string }): Promise<ImportSummary>; type ImportSummary = { added: FeedSource[]; duplicates: string[]; errors: { url: string; reason: string }[] }

contracts.name: DashboardRoot
contracts.signature: React component <DashboardRoot/> mounted by StrataDashboardView; provides PortalRoot ref via context for Radix primitives

contracts.name: ItemCard
contracts.signature: React component <ItemCard itemId={string}/> memoized; subscribes via selectItemById + readIds.has(itemId)

contracts.name: Notifications.notifyNewItems
contracts.signature: function notifyNewItems(feed: FeedSource, count: number): void
